display_text: Lich Aghanim's Scepter: Sinister Gaze becomes an Area of Effect ability. This is a powerful anti-grouping mechanic, punishing grouped enemies by locking down multiple targets simultaneously and allowing Lich to cast other abilities during channeling for continuous disruption.
search_text: Lich Aghanim Scepter Sinister Gaze AoE anti-grouping multi-target disruption channel

display_text: Lich Aghanim's Shard: Ice Spire is a versatile terrain control tool. It counters high-mobility heroes by slowing enemies and forcing them to focus on destroying the spire, while providing additional utility for Chain Frost bounces and Frost Shield healing.
search_text: Lich Aghanim Shard Ice Spire terrain control slow anti-mobility Chain Frost Frost Shield
